text:
Like the revolution of credit to provide adequate funding
                                                                                                                    for the consumer in the United States during the 20th century,
                                                                                                                    development-oriented finance provides adequate credit support for
                                                                                                                    urbanization, acting as the engine power for increasing urbaniza-
                                                                                                                    tion in China. There are five chapters in Part 2, which is concerned about the
                                                                                                                    theoretical contents of development-oriented finance. It mainly con-
                                                                                                                    tains the following:
